title: ACTREC Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 03 Pharmacist Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has announced the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for 03 Pharmacist Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in B.Pharm or D.Pharm can use this chance and apply for the ACTREC Notification 2026 . Here, we have included the age limit, selection process, Salary Structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs...
